chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 106 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.1237/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.1238/2023 (561-A CrPC) 13.12.2023 Mr. Ali Akbar Laghari, Advocate for applicant along with applicant Mst. Saima..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. By order dated 14.11.2023, this bail application, after being converted from petition, was disposed of and applicant Mst. Saima and her alleged husband Ammar were granted protective bail for fifteen days on furnishing PR bond in the sum of Rs.20,000/- to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court to appear before the trial Court for the relief as provided in law. In the same context, this application has been filed, which, on urgent hearing, has been taken up. Learned Counsel submits that under misconception that applicants was required to submit surety of Rs.20,000/-, which she didn’t have at the time of passing of the above order, she could not come in the office of this Court for such purpose, and hence, the protection was not given to her as a result. He submits that if some time is extended to the applicant, she would surrender before the trial Court. According to learned Counsel, even otherwise, applicant’s name is not mentioned in FIR as accused. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail to the extent of applicant Saima is extended for further ten days from today in Crime No.881 of 2023, registered at Police Station Gulistan-e-Johar, Karachi East U/S 496-A, 34 PPC against furnishing a PR bond in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees twenty thousand) to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court.

According to learned Counsel, even otherwise, applicant’s name is not mentioned in FIR as accused. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail to the extent of applicant Saima is extended for further ten days from today in Crime No.881 of 2023, registered at Police Station Gulistan-e-Johar, Karachi East U/S 496-A, 34 PPC against furnishing a PR bond in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees twenty thousand) to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Cr. Bail App. No. D – 106 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 Operation of non-bailable warrants in this case, if any, shall remain suspended during aforesaid period, in which applicant is directed to appear before the Court concerned. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. The listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
